phases.name: freeze_boundaries
phases.objective: Prevent new vertical hardcodes in runtime v2.
phases.acceptance: No new tenant or vertical hardcodes in runtime v2.

phases.name: mandatory_tool_contract
tests: price without quote tool is blocked
requirements without requirements tool are blocked
sensitive policy without FAQ/policy tool is blocked
tool result cannot contain visible final copy
phases.acceptance: Sensitive facts cannot be published without tool trace.

phases.name: tenant_domain_contract_loader
phases.objective: Load domain, fields, tools, pipeline, events, guards and frontend metadata from tenant config.
tests: Non-Dinamo tenant does not load Dinamo fields
phases.acceptance: Runtime and frontend receive tenant/domain metadata without hardcodes.

phases.name: declarative_state_writer
phases.objective: Move sensitive write rules to tenant/domain field policies.
tests: tool_only field cannot be written by model
document received requires attachment or human evidence
phases.acceptance: State writes are configurable and auditable.

phases.name: universal_turn_trace
phases.acceptance: Advisor can explain why AtendIA responded.

phases.name: tenant_aware_frontend
phases.objective: Remove Dinamo knowledge from operational frontend.
tests: appointment_services fixture renders without Dinamo fields
blocked value is not shown as validated
phases.acceptance: Frontend works for two domains without component edits.

phases.name: workflow_business_events
phases.objective: Map universal business events to workflows with idempotency.
tests: side effects stay dry-run without approval
phases.acceptance: Workflows react to business events, not fragile text.

phases.name: fixtures_and_simulations
phases.objective: Test Dinamo and a non-Dinamo tenant without real traffic.

phases.name: shadow_comparison_and_readiness
phases.objective: Compare runtime v2 with legacy without real sends.
phases.acceptance: Rollout can be discussed only after readiness passes.
